item.title: Combobox
item.description: Combobox is an alt-punk band from Portland, Oregon founded by Tyler Schreiber and Zach Kay. Origin Portland, Oregon, USA Genre(s) Rock, Punk Years active 2022-present Website Combobox SoundCloud Combobox About Combobox is the brainchild of Tyler Schreiber and Zach Kay; two classically trained musicians who one day decided they wanted to play post-punk.

item.title: scribble t
item.description: scribble t is the solo project of guitarist and synthesist Tyler Schreiber. AKA Tyler Schreiber Origin Portland, Oregon, USA Genre(s) Electronica, Post-classical Years active 2022-present Website (website link) Bandcamp scribble t About scribble t is a project born out of Tyler Schreiber’s developing fascination with hardware synthesis techniques.
